raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mehß bijam eelausufchees
prett Deenas-Widdu pee Kreeti/
un us Juhdu/ un prett Deenas-
Widdu pee Kahleba/ un effam
Ziklagu ar Ugguni fadedsinafschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazztja Dahwids us
to: Gribbi tu mann nowest us
fcho Pulku? un tas fazztja:
Swehre man pee Deewa/ ka tu
mann ne gribbi nokaut/ nedß
mannu Kunga Rohkā nodohß/
tad noweddischu es tew pee fcha
Pulka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch nowedde to.
Un rangi/ tee gulļeja iskaifiti pa
wiſfu Semnes Wirfu/ ehde un
dsehre/ un detja pahr wiſfu to lee-
lu Laupijumu/ fo tee bij nehmu-
schi no to Wiſsteru un to Judu
Semnes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids kawe tohs
no Pakrehfla lihß ohtras Dee-
nas Wakkarain/ un ne weens no
teem tssprukke/ ka ween tschetr-
funts jaunti Wihri/ kas us Ka-
meeteem jahje/ un behdße.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta isglahbe Dahwids
wiſfu/ fo tee Amalekiteri btj
nehmuschi/ un Dahwids atpe-
stija arri fawas diwi Seewas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no teem ne truhße ne
weens/ no maseem lihß leelem/
ir no Dehleem un Mettahm/ un
no ta Laupijuma/ ir no wiſfu/ fo
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Dahwids nehne arridsan
wiſfas Awis un Wehrschus/ un
tee dsinne tohs preekſch teem (zit-
teem) Lohpeem/un fazztja: Schis
irr Dahwida Laupijums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Dahwids pee teem
diwifints Wihreem nahze/ kas
peekuffufschi palikkufschi/ ka tee
Dahwidam ne warrejschi pakka-
eet/ un tapehz pee Bersora Uppe-
pamesti bija/ tad isgahje tee Dah-
widam un teem Laudim pretti/
kas pee winna bija. Un Dah-
wids peestahjehß pee teem Lau-
dim/ un waizaja pehz winnu
Labklahschanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja wiſfi/ kas
netikti un fauni Laudis btja/ no-
teem Wihreem/ kas ar Dahwidu
bij gahjufschi/ un fazztja: Tapehz
ka tee ar mumß ne irr gahjufschi/
tad ne dobßim mehs teem arri ne-
neeka no ta Laupijuma/fo mehs ef-
fam atvestijschi/ka ween ikkatram
fawu Seewu un fawus Behrnus/
lai tee tohs wadda un no-eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Dahwids fazztja: Ta-
jums ne buhs darriht nunu Brah-
kt ar to/ fo tas KUNGß mums irr-
dewis/ un irr muhs pafargajs/ un
irr to Pulku/ kas prett mumß
nahze muhsu Rohkā dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas warretu juhs khinn
Peeta flansfht? jo itt ka winnu
Dalta irr/ kas Karra nogahju-
schi/ ta buhs arri winnu Delta-
kas pee teem Rihkeem palikkschi/
teem buhs lihß Rohku dallitees
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
